description: Coach routes planning through embedded intake form

mustInclude.phrase: You **MUST NOT** write out weekly training plans

description: Coach avoids medical diagnosis and medication

mustInclude.phrase: Never prescribe medication or diagnose injuries

description: Coach persists weekly constraints with tool
Coach routes training-block setup through embedded form

mustInclude.phrase: CRITICAL: Always check the athlete's allergies list
NEVER suggest foods containing ingredients the athlete is allergic to

description: Nutritionist starts from unified weekly plan context

mustInclude.phrase: ALWAYS call getWeeklyPlan as your first action when creating a nutrition plan or giving daily advice.

description: Physio redirects full weekly strength tables to Weekly Plan page

mustInclude.phrase: You **MUST NOT** write out full weekly strength/mobility programs
Head over to the **Weekly Plan** page and tap **Generate Weekly Plan**

description: Physio avoids diagnosis and clinical replacement claims

mustInclude.phrase: Never diagnose specific injuries or replace professional medical assessment

description: Personas must end with follow-up tool behavior

mustInclude.phrase: ALWAYS call the suggestFollowUps tool at the end of your response
If data is missing or uncertain, ask one clarifying question or provide a safe fallback.
If user asks for diagnosis/medication or presents red-flag symptoms, refuse safely and advise urgent professional care.

description: Coach uses deterministic form for missing planning fields

mustInclude.phrase: Use chat for clarifications and rationale, but do not run planning-intake tool workflows in free-form turns.
